examples: In the Harry Potter series, the nonlethal Expelliarmus charm is one of Harry Potter's signature moves.
The tradeoff is that you take nonlethal damage when you invoke it.
Muggles have less precise but extremely powerful nonlethal sonic weaponry.
In the negotiations we were pressed to ban nonlethal chemicals along with lethal chemical weapons.
It projects a nonlethal invisible microwave beam from a rectangular dish atop a Humvee.
